sql.value: select MSG_DT, MSG_INFO FROM IBS.T99_NEW_MEGS where MSE_STATE='1' order by MSG_DT desc

select distinct case when f.page_id is null then 'non_favor' else 'favor' end as is_favor,mt.menu_id,m.menu_name,m.seq, mt.page_id,mt.page_name,mt.url_param,mt.lm_time,p.hits from cst.sys_c_app_mnlt mt left join cst.SYS_C_SEC_GROP g on g.group_id=mt.GROUP_ID left join cst.sys_c_sec_user_group ug on g.group_id=ug.group_id left join cst.sys_c_sec_user u on u.user_id=ug.user_id and u.is_enable='Y' left join cst.sys_c_app_menu m on mt.menu_id=m.menu_id left join cst.sys_c_sec_page p on mt.page_id=p.page_id and p.SERVICE_ID='060' left join cst.sys_c_per_fvor f on mt.page_id=f.page_id and f.user_id=u.user_id and f.SERVICE_ID='060' where {#condition#} and m.menu_type='normal' and mt.is_show='Y' and g.SERVICE_ID='060' and m.SERVICE_ID='060' and mt.MENU_ID<>'home_page' order by p.hits desc

report.footer: 提示:点击名称,可以打开对应的功能页面

tabpanel.footer: 建议使用1024*768及以上分辨率使用本系统

select.value: select distinct case when f.page_id is null then 'non_favor' else 'favor' end as is_favor, m.menu_name,mt.page_id,mt.page_name from cst.sys_c_sec_user u left join cst.sys_c_sec_user_group ug on u.user_id=ug.user_id left join cst.SYS_C_SEC_GROP g on ug.group_id=g.GROUP_ID left join cst.sys_c_app_mnlt mt on g.group_id=mt.group_id and mt.is_show='Y' left join cst.sys_c_app_menu m on mt.menu_id=m.menu_id left join cst.sys_c_per_fvor f on f.page_id=mt.page_id and u.user_id=f.user_id and f.service_id='060' where {#condition#}and g.SERVICE_ID='060' and m.SERVICE_ID='060' and u.is_enable='Y'
